steps.title: Replace Alberta Birth Certificate
steps.description: Obtain Alberta birth certificate as the foundation document for replacing other identification.
requirements: Completed Alberta Birth Certificate application form
Statutory Declaration for Proof of Identity completed and signed in front of a Notary Public or Commissioner for Oaths
Designated agent with acceptable government-issued photo ID
Designated agent must have known the applicant for at least one year
Applicant must complete the application and consent sections personally
Designated agent must sign the statutory declaration section in front of a Notary Public or Commissioner for Oaths
Payment method for certificate replacement fee
Current mailing address
Original completed documents mailed to an approved Alberta registry service provider

designated_agent_definition.description: A trusted person who applies on behalf of the applicant because the applicant does not have acceptable identification.
requirements: Must know the applicant personally for at least one year
Must have their own acceptable government-issued photo ID
Must complete the required declaration sections
Must verify the applicant's identity through the statutory declaration process
Cannot simply be any witness or acquaintance

steps.title: Replace BC Identification
requirements: Birth certificate or other acceptable primary identity document
Proof of BC residency
One additional piece of acceptable identity documentation
If only one identity document is available, request ICBC one-time exception review
Supporting documents showing legal name and date of birth if required
Complete BCID application at an ICBC driver licensing office
Payment method for BCID card fee
Consent to have photograph and signature captured

steps.title: Open Personal Bank Accounts and Retirement Savings
requirements: Government-issued identification (BCID and/or BC Services Card)
Social Insurance Number (SIN)
Personal information including legal name and date of birth
Current residential address
Mailing address if different from residential address
Contact information
Initial deposit amount if required by financial institution

accounts_to_open.purpose: Daily banking, income deposits, bill payments, and everyday expenses
Emergency savings, financial goals, and building money management habits
Long-term retirement savings and future financial security
notes: Consider professional financial advice before making large contributions

outputs: Ability to receive deposits and manage finances independently

steps.title: Create Secure Document Storage System
requirements: Physical document storage folder or binder
Secure digital backup system
Password-protected digital storage
Email account with recovery options enabled
Document organization categories
List of important account numbers and contacts
Emergency contact information
security_requirements: Store original identity documents in a secure location
Keep encrypted digital copies of critical documents
Use unique passwords for accounts containing personal information
Do not store original documents in unsecured locations
outputs: Reduced risk of lost identity documents
Prepared documentation package for legal, financial, medical, and housing needs
